summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FreeSites V3 landing page - all major features working excellently with only one minor design issue

design_issues.issue: Peach background (section-peach class) not displaying properly

Hero section with 4 floating tilted browser mockup images with bounce animations - all mockups present

6 wavy dividers (SVG wave shapes) between sections working correctly

Scrolling green marquee ticker with keywords: Kostenloses Design, Kein Risiko, 100% Responsive, DSGVO-konform, High-Speed

Guarantee banner: green gradient card with 'Mein Versprechen an dich', handshake emoji 🤝, and 3 check items
Contact section: Mira Knaup contact info, phone +49 151 64004263, email, green WhatsApp CTA card with chat emoji 💬
Footer with FreeSites logo image and working Impressum/Datenschutz dialog modals with correct legal content
All 4 WhatsApp links point to correct URL: https://wa.me/message/K772YPNGJLLON1
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu (4 links in mobile menu)
3 floating sparkle elements in hero section
All animations working: floating mockups, sparkles, badge float, CTA bounce, marquee scroll
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix: Ensure contact section displays peach background by checking CSS specificity for .section-peach class
